calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (414 Faxon Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for and with Debra Dolch (Petitioner/Successor Trustee).

Ms. Fox stated that she has a consent to serve and that Ms. Dolch was named as Successor Trustee in the Trust instrument. The sale was confirmed at $601,200.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
